# Video Background

The video background component allows for full-width looping video backgrounds that add visual interest and motion to sections. The video plays automatically, is muted, and loops continuously to create an engaging background effect.

## Interactive Preview

Use the controls panel below to experiment with the video background across different themes.

<Canvas of={VideoBackgroundStories.Interactive} />
<Controls of={VideoBackgroundStories.Interactive} />

## Properties

### Required Properties

{twigPropsTable(componentProps, 'required')}

### Optional Properties

{twigPropsTable(componentProps, 'optional')}

## Technical Specifications

- **Atomic Level**: Atom
- **Template**: `yds-video-background.twig`
- **JavaScript**: `yds-video-background.js`

### Accessibility

- **Autoplay Considerations**: Video is muted and decorative
- **Motion Preferences**: Respects prefers-reduced-motion media query
- **No Audio**: Background videos should not include essential audio
- **Fallback**: Should include a poster image for browsers that don't autoplay

### Behavior

- **Autoplay**: Automatically plays on page load
- **Muted**: No audio to prevent user disruption
- **Looping**: Continuously loops for seamless background
- **Responsive**: Scales to fill container while maintaining aspect ratio
- **Performance**: May pause when not in viewport to improve performance

## Video Requirements

### Technical Requirements

- **Format**: MP4 (H.264 codec) for best browser support
- **Duration**: 5-30 seconds recommended for loop seamlessness
- **Resolution**: 1920x1080 (Full HD) minimum
- **File Size**: Optimize for web (under 5MB ideal)
- **Aspect Ratio**: 16:9 recommended

### Content Guidelines

- Use subtle, non-distracting motion
- Ensure smooth loop points (end matches beginning)
- Avoid text or important details that need reading
- Consider all users see the content, not just those who can play video
- Ensure sufficient contrast for overlaid text

## Usage Guidelines

### Best Practices

- Use for hero sections or feature highlights
- Keep videos short for faster loading
- Optimize videos for web delivery
- Include a poster frame for initial display
- Ensure content works without the video (progressive enhancement)
- Test on various connection speeds
- Consider mobile data usage

### Things to Avoid

- Don't use videos with essential information (accessibility)
- Avoid videos that distract from main content
- Don't rely solely on video for visual interest
- Avoid long videos that increase page weight
- Don't use videos with rapid motion that could cause discomfort
- Avoid videos that don't loop seamlessly

## Performance Considerations

### Optimization Tips

1. **Compression**: Use modern codecs and compression tools
2. **Resolution**: Provide appropriate sizes for different viewports
3. **Lazy Loading**: Consider loading video only when needed
4. **Fallbacks**: Provide static image fallback for unsupported browsers
5. **CDN**: Host videos on a CDN for faster delivery

### Mobile Considerations

- **Autoplay**: Some mobile browsers restrict autoplay
- **Data Usage**: Consider file size impact on mobile users
- **Performance**: Mobile devices may struggle with high-res video
- **Battery**: Background video can drain battery quickly

## Reduced Motion

The component respects the `prefers-reduced-motion` media query. Users who have enabled reduced motion in their system settings will see a static frame instead of the playing video.

## Implementation Notes

### Basic Usage

```html
<div class="video-background">
  <video autoplay muted loop playsinline>
    <source src="background.mp4" type="video/mp4" />
  </video>
</div>
```

### With Overlay Content

Background videos typically have content overlaid on top:

```html
<div class="section-with-video">
  <div class="video-background">...</div>
  <div class="overlay-content">
    <h1>Your Content Here</h1>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Testing

For comprehensive visual regression testing with all video background variations and theme combinations, see the [Visreg page](?path=/story/atoms-videos-video-background-visreg).

## Related Components

- **Background Image**: Alternative static background option
- **Hero Component**: Often uses video backgrounds
